prerequisites: An active Instatus account with dashboard access.
An API key generated from User settings, Developer settings in the Instatus dashboard.

authMethods.name: API Key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Instatus authenticates requests with an API key sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>). Provide this value in the connector's required api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Sign in to Instatus
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Instatus account at the dashboard. You need access to the account that owns the status page you want to read.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: Go to User settings, then Developer settings (https://dashboard.instatus.com/developer) and copy your API key. This key authenticates against the Instatus API base URL https://api.instatus.com.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header on every request.

sources.title: Get started with Instatus API (official docs)
